nodeName.description: Name of the bare metal node to discover

nodeUuid.description: Optional pinned UUID. Preserves identity across discovery -> delete -> lifecycle.

parentNode.description: Optional UUID of the parent Node (e.g. blade -> enclosure).

ports.description: PXE MAC addresses for Port CRs. At least one is required for managed inspection (inspect_interface: agent).

nodeNamespace.description: Namespace for Node CR (defaults to release namespace)

configurationRef.description: Reference to the NodeConfiguration CR (Ironic endpoint headers)
